examples: HIV has proven to possess an ability to mutate into drug-resistant forms.
Colds mutate even while they're infecting you, and new strains pop up so often that by the time drug-makers create a vaccine against one variation, the serum is already out of date.
Overnight, the gossip begins to mutate into headlines.
Some scientists believe that they can cause cells to mutate and turn into a cancer cell.
Antibiotics lose their effectiveness over time, as bacteria naturally evolve and mutate, becoming resistant.
